relations.rel: generates random string of length 0x3B (59 characters)
responds with pong and includes window and server name
can disguise handshake as HTTP request
RATs are under-researched but highly active in the wild
relations.obj: RATs are under-researched but highly active in the wild

relations.rel: RATs are used for malware surveillance by governments and non-state actors
relations.obj: RATs are used for malware surveillance by governments and non-state actors

relations.rel: publicly available RATs are analyzed for security
relations.obj: publicly available RATs are analyzed for security

relations.rel: analysis supports reverse engineering and vulnerability research
relations.obj: analysis supports reverse engineering and vulnerability research

relations.rel: shared behaviors suggest possible shared code
relations.obj: shared behaviors suggest possible shared code

relations.rel: client-stub communication uses protocol header structure
header includes four bytes of padding
relations.obj: header includes four bytes of padding

relations.rel: day6reak is a handle for John Villamil
Matasano Security team provided guidance and support
